label: Discovery Layer Bypass
description: Discovery layer entirely bypassed by agents under delegation

causal_translation.trigger_text: Your model captures margin at the discovery layer.
causal_translation.rule_text: Agents skip discovery entirely — they already know what they want.
causal_translation.shift_text: Discovery layer is structurally removed from the journey.
causal_translation.effect_text: Effective margin reduced to 10% of baseline — discovery layer destroyed.
